notes: No OpsReportEngine.ts or DailyOpsReport exists before this task.
No /api/report/ops route exists before this task.
T-06 produced t06_daily_ops_report.json artifact (Python), but no TypeScript implementation.
T-10 walk-forward skeleton provides 120 records with regime context (evidence-based, Python artifact).
T-11 freshnessAlert is available via computeFreshnessAlert().
T-12 regimeContext is available via getLatestMarketRegimeContext() + buildRegimeContextSummary().

reusable_components.name: getLatestMarketRegimeContext()
reusable_components.use: Fetches latest persisted MarketRegimeResult from DB

reusable_components.name: DEFAULT_CURRENT_DATE
reusable_components.use: Reference date for freshness computation (hardcoded, tech debt)

reusable_components.name: generateDailyReport()
reusable_components.use: Provides full daily report with marketSummary.regimeContext

unsafe_components.name: generateDailyReport()
unsafe_components.concern: Heavy — calls many engines (events, topics, signals, candidates). Calling it just for Ops Report adds unnecessary overhead.
unsafe_components.resolution: OpsReportEngine uses getLatestMarketRegimeContext() directly. Does NOT call generateDailyReport().

recommended_integration_path: Create standalone OpsReportEngine.ts that uses getLatestMarketRegimeContext() + computeFreshnessAlert() directly. No dependency on heavy DailyReportEngine. Walk-forward summary from T-10 used as static evidence (Python artifact, not re-run from TS).

decision_answers.3_reuse_note: Not recommended — too heavy. Use marketRegimeResult.ts directly.
